title: Hot Wheels RC Aaron Wheelz Wheelie Chair, Remote-Control Wheelchair with Motocross Aaron Wheelz Fotheringham Figure
features: The Hot Wheels RC Wheelz Stuntin' remote-control wheelchair allows kids to experience the thrilling inspiration that is Aaron "Wheelz" Fotheringham, Wheelchair Motocross World Champion ​who performs incredible stunts in his wheelchair.
With the "Wheelz" Stuntin' RC, kids control the awesome spins, tricks and jumps, and there's a "wheelie boost" function that can enhance speed.
Just like the world-renowned athlete, the remote-controlled wheelchair has a self-righting feature -- it gets up from a fall and forges on to the next challenge. The excitement doesn't stop!
Hot Wheels RC Wheelz Stuntin' RC is 6 inches tall, 2-wheel drive, and can reach speeds of more than 30 mph. The controller is rechargeable with the included USB cable.
Kids 6 years old and older can emulate the spirit and the skills of "Wheelz" with this fun and inspiring remote-control vehicle.​​​
description: The Hot Wheels RC Wheelz Stuntin' RC wheelchair is inspired by the four-time Wheelchair Motocross World Champion Aaron 'Wheelz' Fotheringham, who performs the most epic spins and jumps from his wheelchair. With this innovative RC, kids learn that a wheelchair doesn't have to limit awe-inspiring stunts so long as individual determination and desire are there. A 'wheelie boost' feature with stunt bar provides an extra kick to this remote-controlled wheelchair, and its top speed can reach more than 30 scale mph! Colors and decorations may vary.
